message:
feat(http): replace ambient SystemTime with injectable Time source in HttpClient

The HTTP/1.1 client connection pool previously used a free function
pool_now() that read SystemTime::now() directly, making pool timestamp
behavior impossible to test deterministically.

Changes:
- Add time_getter field to HttpClientConfig (defaults to wall_clock_now)
- Add with_time_getter() builder method on both HttpClientConfig and
  HttpClientBuilder for explicit clock injection
- Replace free-function pool_now() with instance method self.pool_now()
- Remove SystemTime/UNIX_EPOCH imports in favor of crate::time::wall_now
- Add deterministic test infrastructure: AtomicU64-based test clock,
  loopback_client_io() helper for pool connection tests
- Add tests: config_with_time_getter_exposes_custom_clock,
  builder_with_time_getter_overrides_pool_clock,
  release_connection_marks_fresh_connection_with_custom_time_getter,
  release_connection_marks_reused_connection_with_custom_time_getter

These tests verify pool bookkeeping timestamps without wall-clock races.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
